DESCRIPTION: The URL of the HashiCorp Vault server.
The path to the KV secret engine.
The version of the KV secret engine (e.g., 1 or 2).
The Vault role to use for Kubernetes authentication.
The mount path for the Kubernetes auth method in Vault.
Static Vault token to use if Kubernetes auth is not available.
Polling interval in milliseconds to check for secret updates. Set to 0 to disable polling.
